reasoning_content:
Now I have a good understanding of the task. I need to implement a lexer that:
1. Takes preprocessed C source code (with line markers like `# linenum filename flags`)
2. Outputs tokens in the same format as `clang -cc1 -dump-tokens`

The key challenges are:
1. Define all C tokens in the ANTLR grammar (SYsULexer.g4)
2. Handle line markers to track file names and line numbers
3. Track StartOfLine and LeadingSpace flags
4. Map ANTLR token names to clang token names

Let me look at more test cases to understand all the tokens I need to support, and then look at the flex implementation for reference.

Let me also check what tokens appear in the test cases by looking at a broader set.
